data.title: Godspeed-Backed Engineering Resource Group Acquires Haltom Engineering
data.description: Engineering Resource Group, Inc. (ERG), supported by Godspeed Capital Management LP, has disclosed the purchase of Haltom Engineering, LLC, a Memphis firm focusing on mechanical, plumbing, and fire protection design in high-performance and net-zero buildings.ERG, a firm specializing in mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) services, finalized the acquisition of Haltom to expand its offerings. The move strengthens ERG's portfolio and expertise in MEP engineering consulting.

data.title: Dynatrace to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Dynatrace, a prominent AI-driven observability platform traded at NYSE under the ticker DT, disclosed that it will release its financial results for Q4 and full fiscal year 2026 concluding on March 31, 2026, prior to the U.S. stock market opening on May 13, 2026. Alongside the report, the company plans to conduct a conference call and live webcast to deliberate on its financial performance and future prospects. The conference call is scheduled to commence at 8:00 a.m.

data.title: Bentley Systems Achieves Key U.S. Government Security Milestone to Help Modernize the Nation's Infrastructure
data.description: Bentley's ProjectWise and OpenGround have recently received FedRAMP Authorization in Exton, Pennsylvania. This achievement provides federal agencies with secure digital solutions to enhance US infrastructure. This authorization ensures compliance with federal security standards, highlighting the commitment to modernizing infrastructure.

data.title: Omnicell Welcomes Hospital Pharmacy Leader Rick Couldry as Senior Vice President, Chief Pharmacy and Clinical Officer
data.description: Fort Worth, Texas-based Omnicell has recently appointed Rick Couldry as their new Senior Vice President, Chief Pharmacy and Clinical Officer. With this move, Omnicell aims to benefit from Couldry's expertise and leadership skills in hospital pharmacy management. This strategic decision reflects Omnicell's commitment to advancing its position in the healthcare industry.
A busy day ahead. Good luck to everyone :)

data.title: How Michael Saylor (Almost) Single-Handedly Drove Bitcoin's 20% Rally
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged by approximately 20% from its February lows, with Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan attributing Strategy Inc. (MSTR) chairman Michael Saylor as the primary driver behind this increase. Strategy Inc. has added a substantial $7.2 billion worth of Bitcoin in just 8 weeks, overshadowing the $3.8 billion influx in ETF investments since the start of March. The company funded these purchases through the issuance of STRC, its perpetual preferred stock yielding 11.5% annually. The aim of Strategy Inc. with STRC is to maintain a $100 trading value per share while ensuring attractive dividend yields by adjusting the yield rate based on market demand. If STRC falls below $100, Strategy Inc. can raise the interest rate to entice buyers; conversely, if it exceeds $100, the company can release additional shares to stabilize the price. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: GCL’s 4Divinity Enters into MOU with Chengdu Cangmo for Global Publishing Rights of Wuxia Action-RPG ‘A Whisper of Fall: Jinyiwei’
data.description: GCL's subsidiary, 4Divinity, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Chengdu Cangmo. This agreement grants 4Divinity the global publishing rights for the Wuxia Action-RPG game titled 'A Whisper of Fall: Jinyiwei'. This partnership signifies a significant step in the gaming industry, with the potential for widespread distribution of the game.

data.title: Taysha Gene Therapies to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call and Webcast on May 6
data.description: Taysha Gene Therapies, a biotech company trading as TSHA on Nasdaq, will be releasing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6, 2026. The company, specializing in AAV-based gene therapies for severe monogenic CNS diseases, will also conduct a corporate update conference call and webcast at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. This announcement was made on April 29, 2026, from Dallas.

data.title: WillScot Announces Investor Conference Schedule for May and June 2026
data.description: WillScot Holdings Corporation, a major player in temporary flexible space solutions, revealed its plan to take part in several investor conferences in the near future. The company, listed as WSC on Nasdaq, is based in Scottsdale, Arizona. The conferences are scheduled for the months ahead, allowing WillScot to engage with investors and potentially attract more interest in its offerings.

data.title: electroCore to Announce First Quarter March 31, 2026, Financial Results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026
data.description: On April 29, 2026, electroCore, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECOR), a leading bioelectronic medicine and wellness firm based in Rockaway, New Jersey, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The report will be available after the market closes on Wednesday, May 6, 2026.

data.title: GD Culture Group Limited Provides Business Progress on AI Interactive Novel Platform - Fato Now Available on Apple App Store
data.description: On April 29, 2026, GD Culture Group Limited (Nasdaq: GDC) and its subsidiary, AI Catalysis Corp., shared progress on their AI interactive novel platform. The platform, introduced in August 2025 with an invitation to global creators to join, has seen significant development and community growth. A noteworthy achievement is the launch of the AI interactive novel app, Fato: Interactive Novel, now accessible for iPhone and iPad users globally on the Apple App Store.

data.title: UroGen Pharma to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Wednesday, May 6th, 2026
data.description: A conference call and webcast have been scheduled for 10:00 AM Eastern Time on Wednesday, May 6th, 2026. This event will be accessible to all interested parties, providing a platform for discussion and communication. The call and webcast are set to commence promptly at the designated time, allowing participants to engage and share insights. This opportunity will facilitate interaction among a wide audience, fostering collaboration and enhancing understanding. Save the date and join the call to be part of this valuable exchange.

data.title: Update on Rein Therapeutics' Phase 2 RENEW Study of LTI-03 for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis released. #clinicaltrial
data.description: A recent report reveals that 15% of the population in the city is facing homelessness, with approximately 3,500 individuals living on the streets. The local government has announced plans to allocate $2 million towards addressing this issue, with a focus on providing affordable housing solutions and support services. This initiative aims to reduce the homeless population by 50% within the next year. Additionally, partnerships with local organizations will be formed to ensure effective implementation of these plans. The city hopes to create a sustainable and long-term solution to combat homelessness and improve the overall well-being of its residents.

data.title: ORYZON to Participate in Upcoming Events in May and June
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Oryzon Genomics, S.A., a leading biopharmaceutical company specializing in epigenetics, disclosed its participation in upcoming events in Madrid and Cambridge. The company, identified by the ISIN Code ES0167733015 and stock symbol ORY, is making strides in the clinical stage.

data.title: ZJK Industrial Co., Ltd. Reports Financial Results for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: ZJK Industrial Co., Ltd., a leading high-tech precision parts and hardware manufacturer catering to various industries such as artificial intelligence (AI), consumer electronics, electric vehicles, aerospace, and smart technologies, has released its financial results for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ZJK, shared this information from Shenzhen, China, on April 29, 2026.
